title: Standardize xiao_s3_wio_sx1262 retirement note in worker20, worker21, worker23 to canonical short form
description: Remove expanded bead lists and merge-resolution comment lines from xiao_s3_wio_sx1262.conf and .overlay files in these worktrees. Propagate exact canonical RETIRED/BLOCKED block from project-LICHEN-2u26.10 / worker12 to prevent future merge conflicts. Follow no-dead-code rule.
